perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a woman in a yellow sweater lying on a sofa, looking at her phone. (2) It cuts to a man (3cTim) in a supermarket wearing a blue hoodie and a flat cap, pushing a shopping cart and looking confused. (3) A close-up shows a Samsung smartphone using 'Circle to Search' on an image of a product. (4) The man browses supermarket shelves and finds specific hygiene products. (5) A woman at home is shown opening a refrigerator and taking out various packaged vegetables. (6) A close-up of the phone screen displays an AI-generated call transcript and summary of shopping items. (7) High-quality cinematic shots of the Samsung S25 Ultra phone are shown, highlighting the camera lenses. (8) Digital screenshots of the Samsung Shop app and promotional landing pages appear. (9) The man stands in the supermarket again, holding the black S25 Ultra and speaking directly to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic background music starts. A female voice is heard asking her husband to buy a product that has run out at home. (2) The man's voice enters in a supermarket setting, sounding slightly frustrated about finding the item. (3) UI sound effects like 'pings' and 'clicks' accompany the demonstration of phone features. (4) A phone call audio segment plays where the man and woman discuss grocery needs. (5) A synthesized AI female voice provides a clear summary of the call recording. (6) The man's tone shifts to a professional promotional style, enthusiastically explaining the S25's AI capabilities and pre-order benefits. (7) The music continues with a consistent tempo until the end, mixed with ambient supermarket sounds.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '欸老公!!' (Hey husband!!) - Decorative hook text. (2) '可以由三星圈選功能耶!' (Can use Samsung circle function!) - Functional feature highlight. (3) '尋找中...' (Searching...) - Progress indicator. (4) '幸好有通話錄音轉文字!' (Luckily there is call recording to text!) - Promotional hook. (5) 'Samsung S25系列 全新上市!' (Samsung S25 series newly launched!) - Main product title. (6) '最高4000元!' (Up to 4000 dollars!) - Promotional discount text. (7) 'TIMS25' - Promo code hook.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Problem scenario -> Tech solution demo -> Product showcase -> Promotion details

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator (Tim), 1 female character (wife) appearing in home scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a blue 'Roots' brand hoodie, and a blue patterned flat cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A home living room with a neutral sofa, a kitchen with a white-tiled wall and refrigerator, and a large supermarket with stocked shelves and bright overhead lighting.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting for product shots and standard bright indoor lighting for vlog segments.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Practical Scenario -> AI Feature Demo -> Product Specs -> CTA/Promotions
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a sponsored tech review and advertisement designed to promote the Samsung Galaxy S25 series. It uses a relatable daily scenario—a husband being asked to buy groceries by his wife—to demonstrate specific AI features like 'Circle to Search' and 'Call Transcript/Summary'. The ultimate goal is to drive sales through the Samsung Shop app by showcasing exclusive pre-order discounts and a promo code.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product demonstration, verbal recommendation of features, and explicit listing of purchase discounts and promo codes.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: 3cTim signature branding, including his specific blue cap, glasses, and high-energy Mandarin delivery.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: This content fits the 'KOL tech review' archetype common in Taiwan, blending lifestyle comedy (husband-wife dynamics) with commercial information.
